description: Firewall test VM C — webserver in test3 zone (used by firewall/test.sh --deep). Provider for the auto-pinhole (#173) live test: consumer test-fw-a in test1 depends on test-fw-c:web, which triggers a cross-zone pinhole into test3 because test1 is in test3.pinhole-allowed-from but NOT in test3.access-to.
